review_title: Seamless integration and saves me time
description: I've had a great experience with the autopilot subscription getting content out weekly that looks professional and doesn't take me a half a day to generate.
author: Stephen J.
pros: Blaze integrated seamlessly with all socials and read the information from our website to create a unique marketing strategy that I could implement immediately.
cons: I did not love the AI videos because of how fake they sometimes were (guy welding with a wrench) but I was able to turn AI videos off or make edits and keep content focused on our brand content.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A Practical Tool for Faster Content and Marketing Execution
description: Overall, Blaze has been a solid tool for improving speed and consistency in content creation. I use it mainly to support marketing efforts and streamline communication, and it has helped reduce the time spent going from concept to final draft. It’s not a full replacement for strategic thinking, but it’s a strong support tool that enhances productivity and makes execution more efficient.
author: Walter Enrique H.
pros: Blaze makes it very easy to go from idea to execution, especially for content and marketing workflows. What I’ve found most valuable is how quickly it helps structure thoughts into usable outputs—whether that’s social media content, landing page copy, or internal messaging. It reduces the friction of starting and keeps momentum going. The interface is simple, and it’s flexible enough to adapt to different use cases without feeling overly technical.
cons: Like most AI tools, the output still requires some refinement depending on the level of specificity you need. For more nuanced or highly strategic content, I still find myself editing to match tone and intent. Also, some features could benefit from deeper customization or integrations, especially for teams managing multiple workflows.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I tried following up for months regarding my problem, no one was able to assist, and even though 50% of my social media content was not being done, I was charged full price, and when I cancelled a 3-month contract, which I paid in excess of $180 after 2 days, I got a refund of $18.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It was able to do my social media content, and their content was actually pretty good, and had some nice designs.
cons: The posts would keep failing, and I tried contacting their customer service, but they kept saying their IT team was working on it. They took months to figure it out, and in the end, I cancelled most of my content with them.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Blaze - 10 out of 10 for content creation
description: On the whole, Blaze has saved me so much time, requiring me just to check the content rather than creating it from scratch. My brand tone has been matched and the content generation has been amazing. In fact it keeps getting better and better, saving me shed loads of time on marketing.
author: Lindy B.
pros: It is great value for money and the image generation on the whole has been fantastic with only a few minor adjustments required.
cons: Integrating accounts has not always been straight forward. Would be better if things like blogs could be linked direct to existing websites rather than Wordpress, and again not being tied to Mailchimp for sending emails as these both incur additional costs. However, they can be easily copied and distributed manually.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Blaze helps me create marketing content quickly and stay consistent with weekly posts. The AI image feature saves time and gives me ideas for topics and visuals. It works well for small businesses that need simple automated marketing without spending hours designing posts.
author: Tabatha B.
pros: I love the AI feature that creates photos of of the topic that i want to choose for marketing weekly.
cons: The AI generated posts are helpful, but editing options are limited once the post is created. I would like the ability to modify the wording, images, or layout after the AI generates the content so I can better match my brand voice and marketing style.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I’ve actually recommended the service to a couple people just to bring their current marketing to a cohesive feel
author: Joel R.
pros: Blaze is one of the few ai marketing platforms that have truly let the whole process run on auto pilot
cons: I wish it had more features, it’s lacking Snapchat and the blog should be able to be able to connect to a webhook for more customization
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Keeps you on track, without worry about derailing creative output. A healthy routine, staying ahead of schedule independent of Ai enabled service.
author: Patrick D.
pros: Starting with onboarding, it's an opportunity for taking the open path approach for creativity and fine tuning brand voice expression.
cons: You will want to stock up con credits always all the time, its so good to use and turn into a weekly to monthly routine.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great AI tool for fast and efficient content creation
author: Jye A.
pros: Blaze is very easy to use and saves a huge amount of time when creating content. I found it especially helpful for generating ideas, drafting copy quickly, and improving workflow efficiency. The interface is straightforward, and it makes tasks like content creation, SEO writing, and customer communication much faster and easier.
cons: At times, the output still needs some editing to make it feel more personalised or aligned with a specific brand voice. Like most AI tools, it works best when you give clear prompts, so there can be a bit of trial and error. I’d also like even more flexibility and refinement options for certain types of content.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: no value at all - lost time and money
description: bad
author: Karelle L.
pros: nothing really ... I just liked the fact it did the calendar. Did not ask me to approuve before posting, I dislike the tool at its very angle
cons: the bad copy, the images are so fake and baddly made. I was shy to publish any of the content. I had to redo entirely every single images.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall it’s a very helpful tool generating a lot of ideas I haven’t been able to come up myself. Also the handling if Blaze is super easy and quick intuitive
author: Rene S.
pros: Blaze truly helps me to find ideas, create and post fresh content to my socials every week. I am on a 3 month plan and the costs are well worth the output.
cons: The AI image generation needs a little bit of tweaking, but as I am aware Blaze is constantly getting better.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Amazing, I use it everyday. So much so, I've set up another company on it. The workspaces are easy to use and invite people on.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: What I love about Blaze is that it’s saving me roughly $20K per month by replacing a traditional marketing agency. I can do everything myself now, which is HUGE for speed, control, and ROI. The support team is on point—fast, knowledgeable, and genuinely helpful whenever I have questions. On top of that, the Blaze community page is packed with smart people and practical ideas you can actually use. Blaze is a killer app for anyone doing business on the web. Once you’re on it, you won’t want to run without it.
cons: It's a little buggy as the AI learns and gets better and while I'm learning the tool, I'm not always sure what it's going to generate.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: A Year In Blaze Still Delivers
description: I’ve been using Blaze for about a year now, and it’s been brilliant. I ran into one issue early on, but the support team walked me through it straight away. Since then, I’ve created hundreds of posts, and it’s saved me a huge amount of time. Highly recommend.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: One of the biggest advantages of using Blaze is how easy it is to publish content on every platform at once. It streamlines the whole workflow and saves a huge amount of time.
cons: The video isn’t great, but it still gets the point across. There’s definitely room for improvement in both quality and clarity.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Setting my online store a Blaze!
description: My experience has been great. They have great customer service and respond very quickly to my needs. Keeping the brand colors throughout the posts and the brand style is important to me, it does a wonderful job doing that. It also keeps up with keywords and the SEO god. LOL I love it.
author: Rachel C.
pros: I'm super thankful that I have Blaze to cover the posting on these social media platforms. I'm busy. I don't have any time to post; I get to about 2 a week just editing a couple here and there. Taking the worry of getting my brand name out there is well worth the money.
cons: I really don't like that you can't link a product to your post. But I have brought this up and have no doubt that they are working on that problem as we speak. The video department needs expanding. The videos need to be longer and have talking heads content.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A Must-Have Tool for Modern Content Creation
description: Overall, Blaze has been a powerful and reliable AI content tool that meaningfully improves speed, creativity, and consistency in day to day work. It reduces the effort required to produce professional quality marketing content and helps maintain a clear, engaging voice across platforms. Despite minor mobile limitations, the value it delivers is significant, and it has quickly become an essential part of the content creation process.
author: Onkar D.
pros: Blaze makes content creation incredibly fast, intuitive, and high quality. The AI understands tone, audience, and purpose with very little direction, which saves significant time when creating marketing copy, social posts, and campaigns. It is especially helpful for brainstorming ideas, refining messaging, and producing ready to use content in seconds. The workflow feels smooth and efficient, making it easy to stay productive and creative at the same time.
cons: Better mobile accessibility and optimization would improve the experience, especially when trying to create or edit content on the go. A few advanced customization controls and deeper integrations with other marketing tools would also make the platform even stronger.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I really love it. It's like having a full-time marketing team on board with breaking the budget. It's a must for small businesses.
author: Janet V.
pros: It provides polished graphics and videos, along with concise language, in every post. It lays it out for you for the week, allowing you to make necessary changes before it goes out. The posts are gaining traction as well. We've increased our views on LinkedIn and Twitter.
cons: I would say the integration of the blog posts. I do have a blog on our site, but it doesn't integrate into the Blaze system. Needs more options other than Wordpress.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Very positive experience. I would say that a good understanding of social content is good to have to understand what kind of content works best for your business.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Simplicity, ease of use, and quality of content. Save so much time for me as a creative to focus on other areas of the business
cons: The easy to use design features make it simple to edit the auto generated content...which in itself is quite good quaility
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Blaze is my social media solution!
description: Overall, the experience has been a great experience. I don't have any complaints. It saves me a lot of time.
author: Maurice S.
pros: I like how you can train the integrated artificial intelligence on your business and have control on the output and creatives.
cons: I don't like how sometime the images don't post on X's platform due the size dimension being inaccurate.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Excellent. It could not be going any better with them. They are infallible. I wish I had discovered them earlier.
author: Matthew F.
pros: Incredible force multiplier. It provides excellent content SEO and all related features. I have a full-time SEO marketing machine producing top-tier work product and materials at a per-day rate.
cons: There is no downside. The only potential issue is that they use MailChimp instead of my email program.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I'm really enjoying it, it's easy to understand and manage the pubs, especially when it comes to adding your own pictures, and correct information so its tailored more to your liking.
author: Alfredo B.
pros: Blaze in general, Blaze is quite easy to use, especially when you need to modify information or add & change Logo's pictures etc. It's not expensive, and help is given very quickly
cons: Once the content is ready, If you don't verify everything, at times, there is inaccurate information. so it's best always reviewing the pubs before it goes live!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Great UI, great team, and one of the best social media platform out there. Team has pivoted quickly.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to set up, runs automatically with minimal effort across multiple social media accounts. Literally zero effort needed if you want to do it that way.
cons: I'm still working with the team to tweak blaze to ensure that our social media posts get more traction. Also wish pricing is more affordable because we have to set up 2 paid accounts as we're a company with a different product name (hence 2 brands essentially).
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: The customer service is outstanding. Quick, friendly, and helpful. Overall, the whole experience has been awesome from start to finish
author: Britt S.
pros: Saves me tons of time. I don’t have to handle all the creative work for Blaze anymore.Now I can focus on the bigger picture and let the ideas flow more naturally
cons: It’s incredibly convenient and surprisingly intuitive to use. Everything just flows naturally, making the whole process feel effortless and enjoyable
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: But overall, I’m very satisfied and I can’t live without Blaze anymore. It saves time and money, but most important it gives me the more leads.
author: Manuela S.
pros: Blaze takes a lot of marketing work off your hands and is much more affordable than a marketing agency.
cons: I do need to review all the content, because sometimes it doesn’t fully match my needs. But maybe my profiel isn’t 100% accurate.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I highly recommend Blaze to any business that's looking to help get their brand out there and ease up some of your own workload!
author: Christopher B.
pros: What's not to like about Blaze? Everything is just amazing. The ease of use, the post it creates, security is of utmost importance to them and outputs impressive post to all Meta spaces!! It actually does a good percentage of my marketing and advertising for me, which frees me up to concentrate on other parts of my business!!
cons: Honestly not too much not to like. I know that the amount you can post weekly is limited to a certain amount but that's totally acceptable for what it does post weekly.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Outstanding, I love coming up with just an Idea and getting to create a blog. And I love posting....
author: larry S.
pros: Thanks for your quick response. I used my Idea and Blaze made it into an excellent Blog. Thanks Guys
cons: I just wish there was more word count for blogs, is all. I could get more, but Blaze has it all.....
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Social Media Presence for A Fractional Cost
description: Through 1.5 months, I am extremely pleased and would highly recommend this product to every other small business I know. it makes my content look professional for a fraction of the cost of a marketing agency.
author: Michael C.
pros: It automates all of my social media for me, and then optimizes the content it creates to increase engagement using AI. Marketing is definitely not a strong suit of mine and this has made generating content and having a social media presence a lot easier
cons: Sometimes, the content can be a bit stagnant, especially with limitations on media (pictures/videos) that you upload to allow it to use, which can create repetitive feeling content. I am having to use another platform to generate more photos to use.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
